mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO employee_permission (员工编码, 页面权限编号, 可查看, 可编辑, 数据范围, 操作范围, version) VALUES
(#{item.employeeId}, #{item.pagePermissionId}, #{item.canView}, #{item.canEdit}, #{item.viewScope}, #{item.operateScope}, 0)

update.foreach: UPDATE employee_permission SET 可查看 = #{item.canView}, 可编辑 = #{item.canEdit}, 数据范围 = #{item.viewScope}, 操作范围 = #{item.operateScope}, version = version + 1 WHERE 员工编码 = #{item.employeeId} AND 页面权限编号 = #{item.pagePermissionId}

mapper.select: SELECT 员工编码 as employeeId, 页面权限编号 as pagePermissionId, 可查看 as canView, 可编辑 as canEdit, 数据范围 as viewScope, 操作范围 as operateScope, version FROM employee_permission WHERE 员工编码 = #{employeeId}
